name: golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev
title: golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev
summary: Detection of the BOM and removing as necessary
description:
Detection of the BOM and removing as necessary
The package utfbom implements the detection of the BOM (Unicode Byte
Order Mark) and removing as necessary. It can also return the encoding
detected by the BOM.
